hiIrr: ⚠️ Very high solar irradiance. Avoid prolonged sun exposure.
hiUV: ⚠️ Very high UV Index. Sun protection is essential!
irrTips: 👒 Wear a hat, sunglasses and sunscreen. Avoid strenuous activity in intense sun.
aExt: 🚨 EXTREME heat risk! Avoid exertion and stay hydrated at all times.
eGps: Could not retrieve temperature via GPS.
eCity: Could not retrieve data for this location.
day_mild: Rest in the shade every hour.
day_moderate: Avoid intense physical effort at midday.
day_high: Avoid working in direct sunlight if possible.
Wear light clothing, a hat and keep hydrated.
Notify supervisors if you feel dizzy or cramp.
day_extreme: Stop work if possible and find a cool place.
Stay constantly hydrated, even if not thirsty.
Seek help if you feel disoriented or have dry skin.
Call emergency services if severe symptoms appear.
night_safe: Safe night conditions. Ensure good ventilation.
night_moderate: Warm night: ventilate the room well.
night_extreme: 🌡️ Hot night: avoid activity and rest in a cool place.
night_water: Drink water before going to sleep.
night_heavy_meal: Avoid heavy meals and drink water regularly.
night_emergency: Avoid exertion. If severe symptoms appear, seek medical help immediately.

push.label: Receive alerts when risk ≥ moderate
push.enabled: Alerts enabled. You will receive notifications when the risk is moderate or higher.

errors.notSupported: Your browser does not support Web Push.
errors.noToken: Could not obtain a notification token.
